description: Lock stainless_steel to Brearley's 1913 Sheffield chromium steel and modern chromium-bearing corrosion-resistant steels.

checks.reason: The scoped node is anchored to Harry Brearley's 1913 chromium rustless steel in Sheffield.
Stainless steel is a steel alloy, so controlled steel production is a hard prerequisite for this scope.
Chromium/passive-film chemistry enables corrosion resistance but is not itself a material component node.
Earlier metallurgy lineage is represented through steel_production, not duplicated as a direct stainless-steel prerequisite.
